rule: Contrast ratio must be at least 4.5:1 for normal text
Large text (18pt+) requires minimum 3:1 contrast ratio
All interactive elements must have visible focus states
Touch targets must be at least 44x44px
All icon buttons must have aria-label or title
Form inputs must have associated labels
Error messages must display below the relevant field
Color must not be the only way to convey information
Images must have descriptive alt text
Navigation must be keyboard accessible
Skip navigation link must be provided
Page title must be descriptive and unique
Heading hierarchy must be logical (h1 > h2 > h3)
Loading states must be communicated to users
Empty states must provide actionable guidance
404 pages must offer navigation options
Buttons must have clear action labels
Dangerous actions must require confirmation
Destructive actions must be visually distinct
Form validation must happen inline
Success feedback must be immediate and clear
Timeout warnings must give sufficient time
Auto-save must indicate save status
Search results must show result count
Pagination must indicate current page
Breadcrumbs must be provided for deep navigation
Tables must have sortable columns for data
Charts must have accessible data alternatives
Dark mode must maintain contrast ratios
Animations must respect prefers-reduced-motion
Font size must be at least 16px for body text
Line height must be at least 1.5 for readability
Paragraph width must not exceed 75 characters
Links must be distinguishable without color alone
Hover states must provide visual feedback
Active states must differ from hover states
Disabled elements must explain why
Required fields must be clearly marked
Password fields must have show/hide toggle
File uploads must show progress
Modals must trap focus correctly
Toast notifications must auto-dismiss
Long content must have scroll-to-top
Data tables must have column headers
Images of text must have text alternatives
Video content must have captions
Audio content must have transcripts
Forms must have submit buttons
Multi-step forms must show progress
Critical data must have undo capability
